description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the docker:latest image with the docker:dind service. Define a single stage "build" and three jobs: build, build-master, and build-master-tag. Include a global before_script that runs docker login -u "$CI_REGISTRY_USER" -p "$CI_REGISTRY_PASSWORD" $CI_REGISTRY. The build job runs on all branches except master, pulls "$CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:$CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG" if it exists, builds with --cache-from "$CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:$CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG" and --pull, tags the image as "$CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:$CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG", and pushes it. The build-master job runs on the master branch and scheduled pipelines, pulls "$CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:latest" if it exists, builds with --cache-from "$CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:latest" and --pull, tags as "latest", and pushes it. The build-master-tag job runs on tags, schedules, and master but not regular branches, builds with --pull tagging the image as $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:$CI_COMMIT_TAG, and pushes it.
